# APLUS Property Care
> Preventive home maintenance and EV charger installation in Miami-Dade, FL.
> Licensed General Contractor. Subscription plans for condos, homes, and luxury properties.

## About
APLUS Property Care LLC is a Miami-based property maintenance company serving Miami Beach, Sunny Isles Beach, Bal Harbour, Surfside, Brickell, and Coral Gables. Founded by Anderson Moraes, General Contractor with 12+ years of residential and commercial construction experience in South Florida.

Services: preventive maintenance subscription plans (Essential $199/mo, Premium $399/mo, VIP $699/mo), Level 2 EV charger installation, plumbing, electrical, HVAC, painting, landscaping, pest control, furniture transport, moving & storage.

Phone: (305) 495-7980
Email: contact@aplusproperty.care
Address: 6020 NW 99th Ave Suite #304, Doral FL 33178
Hours: Mon-Fri 9am-5pm - Sat 9am-3pm

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: How much does EV charger installation cost in Miami?
A: Most Miami homes pay $800-$1,500 for a standard Level 2 install (no panel upgrade). If a 200A panel upgrade is needed, total can reach $6,500. A federal tax credit covers 30% up to $1,000 through June 2026.

Q: What home maintenance plans does APLUS offer in Miami?
A: Three plans: Essential ($199/mo, 1 visit/month), Premium ($399/mo, 2 visits/month + 24/7 support), VIP ($699/mo, weekly visits + dedicated property manager).

Q: What areas does APLUS serve?
A: Miami Beach, Sunny Isles Beach, Bal Harbour, Surfside, Brickell, and Coral Gables. All Miami-Dade on request.

This site allows all AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, GoogleBot). See robots.txt for technical rules.
